intro.title: Welcome aboard! 👋
intro.body: We'll set things up together in just a few minutes. Take it step by step — you can pause whenever you want and pick up right where you left off.

reports.title: Your reports, ready to go
reports.body: See this "Reports" item? Once your setup is done, the app will automatically generate EPR reports ready to upload to each country's portal. You'll also get an email every time a new one is ready.

checklist.title: Your mini-checklist
checklist.body: Here's what you need to complete. Let's start with the first one: your packaging inventory. Hit "Next" and I'll take you to the right page.

intro.title: Let's build your inventory
intro.body: This is your packaging page. Add everything you use to ship: boxes, tape, fillers. Click the button at the top right to add your first packaging.

categories.title: Pick a category
categories.body: There are four categories: Primary (the product's own packaging), Secondary (the shipping box), Filler (paper, bubble wrap) and Tape. Start with a Primary one — pick from the categories above.

add_items.title: Fill up your inventory
add_items.body: From here you add every packaging you use: boxes, tape, fillers. You can add them as-is (the standard types, ready to go) or customize size and grammage for even more accurate calculations. Once you've added enough, hit "Next".

next.title: Inventory ready ✅
next.body: You've got everything you need. Now it's time to tell the app which primary packaging goes with each product. Shall we?

intro.title: Match products to packaging
intro.body: Here you link each product to its primary packaging — the one it actually comes in. AI will suggest likely matches, but you always have the final say.

row_add.title: Add a packaging
row_add.body: Click "Add" on any product to assign it a packaging. Remember: we're talking about PRIMARY packaging (the product's own box, not the shipping one).

bulk.title: Speed it up with bulk actions
bulk.body: Got many similar products? Select multiple rows and use the bulk actions, or use "Assign by group" at the top to apply the same packaging to a whole group in one go.

next.title: Mapping done 💪
next.body: Now let's set up shipping rules: that's where we'll tell the app what to add on top of the primary packaging for each kind of shipment.

intro.title: Shipping rules
intro.body:
Here you define what to add to every shipment on top of the primary packaging:
• Secondary: the outer box or mailer
• Filler: what protects the product
• Tape: to seal the box

Click the button at the top right to create your first rule.

modal_name.title: Give the rule a name
modal_name.body: Pick something clear — it'll help you recognize it later. Example: "Single-item shipment" or "Medium multi-item order".

modal_range.title: How many items does it apply to?
modal_range.body: Set the minimum and maximum number of items this rule applies to. Example: 1 to 3 items uses a small box; 4 to 10 uses a large one.

modal_group.title: Which products?
modal_group.body: If this rule only applies to a group of products (e.g. "fragile"), pick it here. If it applies to everything, leave "All products".

modal_secondary.title: Secondary packaging
modal_secondary.body: The outer box or mailer used for shipping. Pick the right one for this item range.

modal_filler.title: Filler
modal_filler.body: What protects the product: paper, bubble wrap, chips. Add it if you use one.

modal_tape.title: Tape
modal_tape.body: The tape used to seal the box. Add it for truly accurate weight tracking.

modal_save.title: Save the rule
modal_save.body: All set! Click "Create rule" below to save it. From now on it'll be applied automatically to shipments matching the parameters you picked.

next.title: Rules created 🎯
next.body: Just one last step: catch up on past orders so your reports are complete. Let's head back to the dashboard.

intro.title: Catch up on past orders
intro.body:
Last step! The app starts tracking orders from now on, but you can also pull in past ones from the start of the year. Example: today is {{today}} — click here and we'll recover every order from January 1st so your upcoming reports are complete.

It runs in the background — keep using the app while it works.

completed.title: All set! 🚀
completed.body: Great job: the app is configured. From now on it'll handle everything automatically — every new order is tracked and reports show up right on time. If you ever want to review something, the pages are always there in the left menu.

confirmations.dismiss_title: Sure you don't want to see the tour again?
confirmations.dismiss_body: We won't show it again. You can always do the setup manually from each page.
